name: Rice with Garlic and Pine Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a wide skillet.
2. Swirl in the garlic puree.
3. Add the rice and pine nuts to the skillet.
4. Stir and toss until the rice is heated through and has absorbed the butter.
5. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
6. Serve hot.
